title: Pale & Lively
description: All of 2024 Minecraft Live and More Updates
body:
### Just 1.22 Update
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/cpmWH7eWy34" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Note : The update was made in only 7 days and more will come.

 

# 2024 Minecraft Live Features :
⋄ Creaking

⋄ Pale Garden

⋄ Pale Oak Trees

⋄ Pale Moss

⋄ Pale Oak Log & Blocks

⋄ Creaking Heart Log
 

# Extra Updates (DTK) :

⋄ Vertical Slabs (Just Planks for Now)

⋄ New Armor Trim (Cracked Wood)

⋄ 2 New Effects (Claustrophobia & Vitality)

⋄ Falled Logs (4 Oak & 4 Birch for Now)

⋄ Super Birch Biome

⋄ The Fletching Table now has a feature!!

⋄ Some Bug Fixes

⋄ Dripstone Arrow (This is just a test, so it's not working right now)

⋄ Pale Heart

⋄ Pale Syrup
